reach_why: Shared generator-critic failure and prompt laundering are known concerns; symbolism adds little new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: It non-obviously links epistemic contamination, tampered labels, degraded evidence, and performative orthodoxy in one critique.
falsifiable_why: Test with independent critics, prompt ablations, provenance controls, and novelty benchmarks to check laundering claims.
explanation: Fluent rediscovery may mask recycled knowledge when evaluation and evidence are jointly contaminated.
